summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 25 job candidates; no shared canonical was identified because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, fix artifacts, labels, comments, or closures are planned.
